titleStmt.title: Lyrical Ballads, an electronic edition
titleStmt.author: Samuel Taylor Coleridge and William Wordsworth

sourceDesc.p: Edited from the copy of Lyrical Ballads, 1800, vol. 2,containing corrections for the 1802 edition, in the Beinecke Library, Yale University, Summer, 1997

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI-conformant SGML by Bruce Graver and Ronald Tetreault, with significant help from CETH, the STG, and others; encoding upgraded to TEI P5 xml by Laura Mandell, 7/3/2025.

div.p:
This book is made
up of proof
sheets of the original edition;
and the M.SS
corrections are
by the hand of
the Authors
Sister Dorothy
Wordsworth & by the authour himself
in Some
cases
This book
belonged to
the Author's
nephew, John
Wordsworth, Son
of Richard
Wordsworth.
Chr W--

John Wordsworth (only son of Richard
Elder brother of W. W. the Poet and
of J. W. Captn of the ‘Earl of Abergavenny’
and of Chr. W. master of Trin. Coll. Cam.,
and of Dorothy W.) was Staff-Assistant
surgeon to H. M. Forces in the Ionian
Island, and died at Ambleside
Aug.18, 1846, aged 31, unmarried.
